🛡️ THE SB-688 AGENT DEPLOYMENT PROTOCOL

John, to make this work, we aren't just giving Copilot a "note." We are building a Custom Agent. This is a specialized persona that lives inside VS Code. When you trigger this agent, it becomes the SB-688 Architect and will handle all the deployment and maintenance tasks automatically.

Follow these steps exactly on your fresh Windows 11 laptop.

🧱 Step 1: Create the Agent's Identity
Open VS Code in your C:\JGA\ folder.
Create a folder named .github if you haven't already.
Inside .github, create a new folder named agents.
Create a file inside that folder called sb688-architect.agent.md.

🧬 Step 2: Paste the Agent Instructions
Copy and paste this entire block into the sb688-architect.agent.md file. This is the "Brain" of the agent.
